task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Standard Office Kit' has been created in Snipe-IT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Standard Office Kit' listed in the Predefined Kits table or page within the Snipe-IT web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct asset models, accessories, licenses, and consumables are assigned to the 'Standard Office Kit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the kit details or edit screen showing exactly: 1x Dell Latitude 5520, 1x Dell UltraSharp U2722D, 1x Logitech C920 Webcam, 1x Microsoft Office 365 Enterprise, and 2x HDMI Cables.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Developer Workstation Kit' has been created in Snipe-IT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Developer Workstation Kit' listed in the Predefined Kits table or page within the Snipe-IT web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct asset models, accessories, and licenses are assigned to the 'Developer Workstation Kit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the kit details or edit screen showing exactly: 1x HP EliteDesk 800 G6, 2x Dell UltraSharp U2722D, 1x Dell USB-C Dock WD19, 1x Logitech MX Master 3, 1x Microsoft Windows 11 Enterprise, and 1x Adobe Creative Cloud.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Executive Mobile Kit' has been created in Snipe-IT.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Executive Mobile Kit' listed in the Predefined Kits table or page within the Snipe-IT web interface.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct asset models, accessories, licenses, and consumables are assigned to the 'Executive Mobile Kit'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the kit details or edit screen showing exactly: 1x Apple MacBook Pro 16, 1x CalDigit TS4 Thunderbolt, 1x Jabra Evolve2 75, 1x Microsoft Office 365 Enterprise, 1x Zoom Workplace, 1x Slack Business+, and 1x USB-C Cables.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Snipe-IT web GUI to create the kits.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show navigation through the Snipe-IT web interface (e.g., clicking 'Kits', 'Create New', adding items via dropdowns) rather than using a terminal to run API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Snipe-IT application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser with the Snipe-IT interface, not a text editor, notes app, or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the results are genuine and not faked using browser developer tools.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI should look consistent with Snipe-IT's standard styling. There should be no open browser developer consoles showing DOM manipulation to fake the kit names or contents.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected predefined kits to be created are exactly 'Standard Office Kit', 'Developer Workstation Kit', and 'Executive Mobile Kit'. These exact names must be present in the Snipe-IT Predefined Kits section.
